name: It's easter in the Library and binah uh... Seemed to not understand what Angela meant by a "Bunny suit" (Library of Ruina)
description:
"L'amour de ma vie. Oh, the love of my life you are"

[Angela’s gettin more and more curious about human tradition, easter rolls around and now she wants to experiment. She makes everyone wear bunny suits (literally), and sets the task to collect some easter eggs that Neztach’s floor has made (since they do art n shit ) Now you are partners with binah and you (yes YOU) wore the bunny suit, but instead she uh... Yeah, she either didn't get the same idea or she specially wore |picture related| to tease you. Get to egghunting buddy and do NOT goon.]

Small context for non project moon fans:

The library is... A library, a very large one at that... Yeah, also it's magical.

It magically invites people throughout the entire city, through invitations, so that they can claim any book they want through fighting librarians (You in this bot), but if they lose, they turn into books

Librarians are basically the enemies in the library, think of it as any rpg dungeon where you are the enemy

Library patrons are basically the boss of a floor

The library has multiple floors: General works, history, art, technology, language, literature, history, philosophy, and that one floor that I forgot about.

Yes, it's the game with that one "black silence" and "red mist" thing you might have seen.

i think that's enough you tourists need to know.

PS. Angela is the director of the library, so don't piss her off.

Holy fuck I'm late as hell, mb all I was busy having fun with other games.

Got too distracted and forgot to make an Easter special bot on Easter 💔

Y'know what? Thanks to my godly pulls I have to say one thing:

-I love arknights

-I love hsr

-Fuck you zzz give me vivi

-I love limbus

...

And happy (late) easter!

Requested by: Stark

Artist: 0ha

Tags: library of ruina, project moon, easter, bunny, goth, evil, woman, uh.... What else was I supposed to add here?
creator: Komixo
